name: Cloudflare File Upload Endpoint Hardening Pack
objective: Protect common file upload endpoints from method abuse and malformed upload traffic by enforcing POST-only access and optional content-type restrictions.
risk_mitigated: Upload endpoint abuse via unsupported HTTP methods
Unintended file submission paths receiving arbitrary payloads
Malformed or suspicious multipart/form-data upload attempts
Automated probing and abuse of file APIs

rules.description: Allow only POST requests on known upload routes.
Optional: enforce expected upload content-type values for upload routes.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path matches "^/(upload|uploads|api/files|api/upload)(/.*)?$" and http.request.method eq "POST" and not lower(http.request.headers["content-type"][0]) matches "^(multipart/form-data|application/octet-stream|application/pdf|image/|text/plain)")

rules.description: Flag upload POST requests missing content-type header.
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path matches "^/(upload|uploads|api/files|api/upload)(/.*)?$" and http.request.method eq "POST" and len(http.request.headers["content-type"]) eq 0)

tuning_notes: Update URI regex to match your exact upload routes and exclude non-upload POST endpoints.
Start content-type allowlist rule in log mode; tighten allowlist values after observing normal traffic.
If clients include charset/boundary parameters, ensure regex accommodates them.
Pair this pack with Cloudflare rate limiting and origin-side max body size enforcement for full abuse resistance.
deployment_guidance: Deploy in log/simulate mode first for at least 7 days.
Validate allowed upload clients (web, mobile, API integrations) and expected content types.
Promote POST-only rule to block once false positives are cleared.
Keep optional content-type rule in log or managed challenge before switching to block.
Coordinate with application controls: authentication, malware scanning, extension/MIME validation, and object storage lifecycle policies.

primary_signals: Count of blocked non-POST requests to upload paths
Count of upload POSTs with missing content-type
Top source IPs/ASNs triggering upload rule events
dashboards: Cloudflare Security Events filtered by upload route regex
WAF action trend by rule ID for upload hardening pack
alerting: Spike in non-POST blocks against upload endpoints
Sustained increase in content-type mismatch events
Sudden burst of upload traffic from new geographies or ASNs
